metadata.description: Architectural rules for OKD-Metal installer, extracted from ADRs
metadata.author: MCP ADR Analysis Server

rules.name: Ansible-First Orchestration
rules.description: All provisioning workflows must be implemented as Ansible playbooks and roles. No standalone API services or custom orchestration daemons.
rules.validation: All automation files must be .yml Ansible playbooks or role structures

rules.name: Ansible Collection Structure
rules.description: The project must follow Ansible collection layout: roles/, playbooks/, inventory/, group_vars/, host_vars/, files/, templates/
rules.validation: Directory structure must contain required Ansible directories

rules.name: Inventory-Driven Topology
rules.description: Cluster topology (SNO, compact, HA) must be auto-detected from Ansible inventory host counts and role assignments. No separate topology configuration parameter.
rules.validation: Topology detection logic must exist in ignition_generate role

rules.name: Credential Isolation
rules.description: All secrets (AWS credentials, pull secrets, SSH keys) must be managed via Ansible Vault or environment variables. Never store secrets in plain text in inventory or var files.
rules.validation: No plain text secrets in any committed files

rules.name: Ignition Config Security
rules.description: Ignition configuration files must have 0600 permissions and be served over time-limited HTTP or HTTPS only.
rules.validation: File permissions and serving configuration must enforce security

rules.name: CoreOS Variant Explicit Selection
rules.description: The target OS (FCOS or SCOS) must be an explicit configuration variable, never auto-detected or assumed.
rules.validation: coreos_variant variable must be defined in group_vars/all.yml

rules.name: Disconnected-First Design
rules.description: All roles must function without internet access when disconnected=true. No hardcoded external URLs without fallback to local paths.
rules.validation: All URL references must be configurable with local alternatives

rules.name: ISO Customization via coreos-installer
rules.description: Boot media customization must use coreos-installer iso customize. No manual ISO manipulation or third-party ISO tools.

rules.name: Pre-flight Validation
rules.description: Every deployment playbook must include pre-flight checks that validate compatibility between OS variant, ISO version, openshift-install version, and cluster topology.
rules.validation: Pre-flight role must be included in all deployment playbooks

rules.name: Idempotent Operations
rules.description: All Ansible roles must be idempotent -- safe to re-run without side effects. Use Ansible modules with state management rather than raw shell commands where possible.
rules.validation: Roles must use Ansible modules over shell/command where feasible
